evals.prompt: Design a synthetic probe to validate that your login flow works in production, covering authentication and dashboard access
expected_patterns: SYNTHETIC_USER_EMAIL OR SYNTHETIC_USER_PASSWORD OR env credentials
anti_patterns: real user account OR personal credentials

evals.prompt: Write an API health check probe that validates database and cache connectivity without mutating data
Set up alerting rules for synthetic probes that avoid alert fatigue while catching real outages
expected_patterns: consecutive failures OR 2 consecutive OR 3 consecutive

evals.prompt: Design a multi-region monitoring strategy for a global application with probes in three regions
expected_patterns: us-east-1 OR us-west OR equivalent primary region
eu-west-1 OR eu-central OR equivalent EMEA region
ap-southeast-1 OR ap-northeast OR equivalent APAC region
regional latency dashboard OR track by region

evals.prompt: Create a dedicated synthetic test account setup with proper isolation and cleanup requirements
expected_patterns: is_synthetic flag OR synthetic=true OR _synthetic in identifier
excluded from analytics OR excluded from billing
cleanup OR delete immediately OR non-destructive

evals.prompt: Calculate availability and error budget for a service with 99.9% SLA, showing monthly downtime allowance and budget consumption
anti_patterns: downtime in seconds without monthly context

evals.prompt: Set up synthetic monitoring using Playwright and GitHub Actions with scheduled probe execution every 5 minutes
expected_patterns: npx playwright test probes/ OR playwright test

evals.prompt: Write a probe that validates search functionality with a latency budget and ensures it completes within SLA thresholds
expected_patterns: request.get OR page.fill and page.click for search
Date.now() OR performance.mark OR latency measurement
query OR search term OR result validation
anti_patterns: assert only on status, not on results

evals.prompt: Configure environment-aware probes that can run against staging and production without code changes
anti_patterns: same thresholds for staging and production

evals.prompt: Create a probe runbook linking failure triage, first-response diagnosis, and escalation paths for a payment integration probe
expected_patterns: what the probe tests OR probe definition
